import React from 'react'; import { useNavigate } from 'react-router-dom'; const Home: React.FC = () => { const navigate = useNavigate(); const containerStyle: React.CSSProperties = { maxWidth: '1200px', margin: '0 auto', padding: '40px 20px', textAlign: 'center' }; const heroStyle: React.CSSProperties = { backgroundColor: '#1A3C5E', color: 'white', padding: '80px 40px', borderRadius: '12px', marginBottom: '60px', boxShadow: '0 10px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)' }; const cardStyle: React.CSSProperties = { backgroundColor: 'white', padding: '30px', borderRadius: '12px', boxShadow: '0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.05)', textAlign: 'left', display: 'flex', flexDirection: 'column', justifyContent: 'space-between' }; const sectionTitleStyle: React.CSSProperties = { fontSize: '28px', fontWeight: 'bold', marginBottom: '40px', color: '#1A3C5E' }; return (
{/* Hero Section */}

Decentralized KYC System

Verify once. Use everywhere. Your document never leaves your device.

{/* How It Works */}

How It Works

📤

Step 1 — Upload Document

Your document is hashed in your browser using SHA-256. The file never leaves your device.

⛓️

Step 2 — Blockchain Verification

Node 1 confirms your identity and locks your hash permanently on Ethereum blockchain.

🔄

Step 3 — Reuse Everywhere

Any Node 2 can verify you instantly using only your hash. Document never transmitted again.

{/* Feature Grid */}

📝 Register KYC

Upload your document once. Hash generated in your browser. Complete your on-chain identity registration.

✅ Verify User (Node 1)

Approve registered users and lock their hash on blockchain. For trusted verification nodes only.

🔍 Request Access (Node 2)

Verify a user using hash comparison. Zero knowledge of document content. Instant and secure.

🔎 Check Status

Check KYC verification status of any wallet address. View the public audit trail.

{/* Privacy Box */}
🔒 Zero Document Transmission — Only a 64-character mathematical fingerprint ever leaves your browser
); }; export default Home;
